---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
comments: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Welcome to **SheafofThoughts**.

This is a mathematics blog with posts at different levels and on different themes. The homepage is organized by category: click a title inside a box to jump directly to the recent posts in that class.

## Browse by category

::: {.category-grid}

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Topic
:::
### [Algebraic Geometry](posts.html#category=Algebraic%20Geometry)

schemes, cohomology...
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Topic
:::
### [Number Theory](posts.html#category=Number%20Theory)

diophantine equations, primes, number-theoretic curiosities...
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Level
:::
### [Beginner](posts.html#category=Beginner)

Beginner-friendlier posts meant to explain ideas slowly and from first principles.
:::

::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Level
:::
### [Intermediate](posts.html#category=Intermediate)

Posts aimed at readers with more background who want denser mathematical content.
:::
:::

## Series

::: {.series-grid}
::: {.category-card}
::: {.category-card-top}
Series
:::
### [Fermat’s Christmas Theorem](posts/fermat-christmas-theorem/)

A series of posts aimed at proving Fermat's Christmas Theorem.
:::
:::
